incidence.source: Primary care and allergy clinic data

burden.dalyPerCapita: low mortality; significant itch and sleep disturbance

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Clinical wheals lasting <24h; chronic urticaria defined as >6 weeks

publicHealthSystem.estimatedPatients: Millions with acute episodes; hundreds of thousands with chronic disease

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Clinical diagnosis with limited labs for chronic cases
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Second-generation antihistamines, dose escalation; omalizumab or ciclosporin for refractory cases
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Access disparities to biologics across countries
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: EAACI guideline-based care and broad antihistamine availability
